recalls.Description: Mindbodygreen is recalling its Ultimate Multivitamin+ dietary supplement bottles due to a serious risk of poisoning in children. These eight-ounce amber glass bottles contain 60 capsules each and were manufactured without the required child-resistant packaging, violating safety standards. The recall affects various lots with specific manufacturing dates and UPC codes, which can be found on the product label. Consumers should take immediate action to secure these products away from children.
recalls.Title: Mindbodygreen Recalls Ultimate Multivitamin+ Due to Child Poisoning Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Mindbodygreen via email at multi@mindbodygreen.com or visit their website at shop.mindbodygreen.com/pages/multi-update for further details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Mindbodygreen Ultimate Multivitamin+ Dietary Supplement Bottle
Label on Mindbodygreen Ultimate Multivitamin+ Dietary Supplement Bottles

Manufacturers.Name: Arizona Nutritional Supplements, of Chandler, Arizona

Retailers.Name: Available at Mindbodygreen.com from November 2021 to November 2025, priced between $40 and $70 based on subscription.

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from child poisoning due to lack of child-resistant packaging.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should secure the bottles out of children's reach and request a free child-resistant cap from Mindbodygreen.

recalls.metaDescription: Mindbodygreen recalls Ultimate Multivitamin+ due to child poisoning risk. Secure bottles and request a replacement cap.

recalls.Description: RootStim is recalling its Beard Growth Serum spray bottles due to a serious safety hazard. The product, packaged in black boxes with distinctive orange and white lettering and an orange mustache icon, does not comply with child-resistant packaging standards as mandated by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act. This poses a significant risk of poisoning if ingested by young children.
recalls.Title: RootStim Beard Growth Serum Spray Bottles Recalled Due to Child Poisoning Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach RootStim at 202-743-1714, available Monday through Friday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET. Alternatively, they can email finergraceing@gmail.com or visit https://rootstim.com and select "Contact Us" for more information.

Products.Name: RootStim Beard Growth Serum Spray, 5% Minoxidil

Images.Caption: Recalled RootStim Beard Growth Serum Packaging (Front)
Recalled RootStim Beard Growth Serum Packaging (Side)
Recalled RootStim Beard Growth Serums, 5% Minoxidil 2.0 Oz/60ml

Manufacturers.Name: Ronghui Intelligent Manufacturing Technology (Guangzhou) Co., Ltd., of China

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from November 2024 through September 2025 for approximately $20.

Hazards.Name: Non-compliant child-resistant packaging leading to potential poisoning risk for children

Remedies.Name: Secure the serum bottles out of children's reach and contact RootStim for a replacement.

recalls.metaDescription: RootStim recalls Beard Growth Serum due to child poisoning risk. Secure bottles and contact for replacement instructions.

recalls.Description: Ruahouine Hair Growth Serum, packaged in 60ml transparent amber dropper bottles, has been recalled due to safety concerns. The labels feature the names "Ruahouine", "Minoxidil Hair Growth Serum", and "5% Minoxidil With Biotin". The product does not meet the required child-resistant packaging standards, posing a serious risk of poisoning to young children if ingested.
recalls.Title: Ruahouine Hair Growth Serum Recalled Due to Child Poisoning Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should contact Ruahouine at ruahouine@gmail.com for further assistance.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from January 2025 to July 2025 for approximately $10.

Hazards.Name: Non-child-resistant packaging leading to potential poisoning risk for children.

Remedies.Name: Secure the recalled serum bottles out of children's reach, contact Ruahouine for disposal instructions, and request a refund or replacement.

recalls.metaDescription: Ruahouine Hair Growth Serum recalled due to child safety risks. Learn how to secure and return the product for a refund.

recalls.Description:
Feel The Beard is recalling its Beard Growth Oil due to serious safety concerns. This product, packaged in a one-ounce dark amber bottle with a black dropper cap, is labeled "Beard Growth Oil," "Feel The Beard," and contains "5% minoxidil with biotin." The packaging fails to meet child-resistant standards set by the Poison Prevention Packaging Act, creating a risk of severe injury or death if ingested by children. 
Consumers are urged to keep the recalled serum out of children's reach and contact Feel The Beard for guidance on safely disposing of the product and obtaining a replacement. The company requires consumers to dispose of the serum by pouring it into the trash and sending a photo of the bottle in the trash to ziyad@feelthebeard.com.
recalls.Title: Feel The Beard Recalls Minoxidil Beard Growth Serum Due to Child Poisoning Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, email Feel The Beard at ziyad@feelthebeard.com.

Products.Name: Feel The Beard Minoxidil Beard Growth Oil

Images.Caption: Recalled Feel The Beard Growth Oil Bottle
Recalled Feel The Beard Growth Oil Bottle (side view)

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com from April 2025 to September 2025 for approximately $10

Hazards.Name: Risk of serious injury or death from child poisoning due to non-child-resistant packaging

Remedies.Name: Instructions for safe disposal and replacement of the recalled serum

recalls.metaDescription: Feel The Beard recalls Minoxidil Beard Growth Oil due to child safety risks. Secure the product and contact for disposal instructions.

recalls.Description: F&F Fine Wines has announced a recall for specific glass bottles of Kirkland Signature Valdobbiadene Prosecco DOCG due to a potential laceration hazard. These bottles are identifiable by their green color, purple foil caps, and a label that reads 'Kirkland Signature Valdobbiadene Prosecco Superiore DOCG'. The product UPC is 196633883742, and the Costco Item Number is 1879870. The bottles were available for purchase at Costco locations across several states.
recalls.Title: F&F Fine Wines Issues Recall for Kirkland Signature Valdobbiadene Prosecco DOCG Bottles Due to Breakage Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers should contact Ethica Wines at 786-810-7132, Monday through Friday, from 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. EST, or reach out via email at customercare@ethicawines.com.

Products.Name: Kirkland Signature Valdobbiadene Prosecco DOCG Bottles

Images.Caption: Recalled Kirkland Signature Valdobbiadene Prosecco DOCG bottle

Injuries.Name: F&F Fine Wines International, Inc. has received ten reports of the bottles shattering or breaking, resulting in one laceration injury.

Retailers.Name: Costco locations across IA, IL, IN, KY, MI, MN, MO, ND, NE, OH, SD, and WI from April 2025 through August 2025, priced around $8.

Importers.Name: F&F Fine Wines International, Inc. dba Ethica Wines, of Miami, Florida

Hazards.Name: Risk of laceration from breaking or shattering bottles

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the affected bottles immediately, avoid opening them, and dispose of them in household trash. For a full refund from Costco, please contact Ethica Wines for further instructions.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall alert: Kirkland Signature Valdobbiadene Prosecco DOCG bottles pose a laceration hazard. Contact Ethica Wines for a refund.

recalls.Description:
Creekwood Naturals is recalling its Gum Spirits of Turpentine bottles due to a serious hazard of child poisoning. These bottles, made of clear glass, feature a brown label with bold lettering that prominently displays "Turpentine" along with "Pure Gum Spirits" or "Quality Gum Spirits." The lack of child-resistant packaging violates safety regulations, creating a significant risk for young children. 
Consumers are urged to secure these bottles away from children and contact Creekwood Naturals for a free replacement child-resistant closure. It is crucial to act quickly to prevent potential poisoning incidents.
recalls.Title: Creekwood Naturals Recalls Turpentine Bottles Due to Child Poisoning Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach Creekwood Naturals at 877-754-1776 from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, email Sales@CreekwoodNaturals.com, or visit https://CreekwoodNaturals.com/pages/recall for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Creekwood Naturals 100% Natural Pure Gum Spirits Turpentine bottle

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon, Etsy, eBay, and Creekwood Naturals from June 2023 through May 2025, priced between $20 and $40.

Hazards.Name: Risk of poisoning due to lack of child-resistant packaging

recalls.metaDescription: Creekwood Naturals recalls Gum Spirits of Turpentine bottles due to child poisoning risks. Secure bottles and contact for a free replacement closure.

recalls.Description: Diamond G Forest Products is recalling its 100% pure gum spirits of turpentine, packaged in 4-ounce clear glass bottles. These round bottles feature labels that read "Georgia Pine Gum Spirits of Turpentine" and "Diamond G Forest Products." The recall is initiated due to the failure to meet child-resistant packaging standards, posing a significant risk of serious injury or death from poisoning if ingested by children.
recalls.Title: Diamond G Forest Products Issues Recall for Turpentine Bottles Due to Child Poisoning Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Diamond G Forest Products at 912-647-7463 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, or email diamondgforestproducts@hotmail.com. More information can also be found online at www.diamondgforestproducts.com/recall-information or by visiting www.diamondgforestproducts.com and selecting "Recall" from the dropdown menu.

Products.Name: Georgia Pine Gum Spirits of Turpentine

Images.Caption: Recalled Diamond G Forest Products Georgia Pine Gum Spirits of Turpentine Bottle

Manufacturers.Name: Diamond G Forest Products LLC, of Patterson, Georgia

Retailers.Name: Nature's Corner Market in Marietta, GA; Cornerstone Retreat in Gap, PA; Nickel Mine Health Foods in Paradise, PA; Leaves of The Trees in Memphis, TN; Country Boy's Mini Mall in Bristol, GA; and available online at Amazon from January 2021 through April 2025 for approximately $17.

Hazards.Name: Lack of child-resistant packaging for turpentine, leading to potential poisoning risks for children.

Remedies.Name: Secure the recalled turpentine bottles away from children and contact Diamond G Forest Products for a free replacement child-resistant closure.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Diamond G turpentine bottles due to child poisoning risk. Secure bottles and contact for a free replacement closure.

recalls.Description:
The recall affects Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil, packaged in 118 ml amber glass bottles with black screw-on caps. Each bottle features a label stating "Euqee, Essential Oil, Premium Grade, 100% Pure Plant Extract and Wintergreen" on the front, while the back includes safety information and storage guidelines. The product does not comply with the Poison Prevention Packaging Act, as it lacks child-resistant packaging, increasing the risk of poisoning if ingested by children.

Consumers are advised to keep the recalled essential oil out of children's reach and contact DLWL-US for a full refund. The company will provide a pre-paid return label and packaging for the safe return of the product. DLWL-US and Amazon.com are proactively reaching out to all customers who purchased the item.
recalls.Title: Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil Recalled for Poisoning Risk Due to Non-Child-Resistant Packaging
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, reach out to DLWL-US via email at gzzlhus@163.com, or visit www.euqee.net/page9 or www.euqee.net and click on "Recall" at the top of the page.

Retailers.Name: Available exclusively on Amazon.com from December 2023 through August 2024, priced around $8.

Distributors.Name: DingLinWangLuoKeJiGuang ZhouYouXianGongSi, dba DLWL-US, of China

Hazards.Name: Non-child-resistant packaging increases poisoning risk due to the presence of methyl salicylate.

Remedies.Name: Return the product for a full refund with a pre-paid return label provided by DLWL-US.

recalls.metaDescription: Euqee Wintergreen Essential Oil recalled due to poisoning risk; non-child-resistant packaging violates safety regulations.
